name: delon-chart
description: @delon/chart skill - G2Plot enterprise charting components with @delon/chart. For ng-events construction site progress tracking system.
capabilities: Create chart card containers with titles and trend indicators
Build bar charts with custom heights and colors
Generate pie and donut charts with legends
Implement radar charts for multi-dimensional data
Display timeline charts for time-series data
Add trend indicators showing percentage changes
author: 7Spade
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill containing only markdown content and TypeScript code examples. No executable code, scripts, network calls, or file system access. All 61 static findings are false positives caused by the scanner misinterpreting documentation patterns as security threats.
valueStatement: Creating enterprise charts in Angular requires understanding G2Plot APIs and ng-alain patterns. This skill provides ready-to-use component patterns for bar, pie, radar, and timeline charts using @delon/chart.
limitations: Requires @delon/chart package installed in Angular project
Only supports ng-alain compatible Angular applications
Does not include chart export or image generation features
Limited to predefined chart types (bar, pie, radar, timeline)

useCases.title: Build dashboard visualizations
useCases.description: Create data dashboards with multiple chart types for business intelligence

useCases.title: Add charts to admin interfaces
useCases.description: Integrate enterprise charts into admin dashboards using component patterns

useCases.title: Visualize task progress
useCases.description: Display task status breakdowns and growth metrics with interactive charts

promptTemplates.title: Basic bar chart
promptTemplates.prompt: Show me how to create a bar chart with @delon/chart using Angular signals

promptTemplates.title: Pie chart with legend
promptTemplates.prompt: How do I create a pie chart with legend and donut option using @delon/chart

promptTemplates.title: Dashboard with multiple charts
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a dashboard example with chart-card, bar chart, and pie chart components

promptTemplates.title: Performance optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: What are the best practices for optimizing chart performance and handling large datasets

bestPractices: Use computed signals for reactive chart data instead of direct mutations
Transform data outside templates using computed() for better performance
Handle loading and empty states with @if blocks for better user experience
antiPatterns: Mutating chart data directly without using signals - use .update() method instead
Putting complex filtering logic in template bindings - use computed signals instead
Re-fetching data on every change detection cycle - memoize with computed signals

faq.question: Which Angular versions are supported?
faq.answer: @delon/chart supports Angular 17+ with standalone components and signals for reactive data binding.

faq.question: What chart types are available?
faq.answer: Bar, mini-bar, pie, radar, timeline, chart-card, and trend components are included in the library.

faq.question: How do I install this package?
faq.answer: Run npm install @delon/chart@20.1.0 and import components directly in standalone Angular components.

faq.question: Is data sent to external servers?
faq.answer: No. This is a client-side charting library. Data remains in your Angular application.

faq.question: Why is my chart not updating?
faq.answer: Ensure you are using signals for data. Direct array mutations do not trigger change detection.

faq.question: How does this compare to ng-zorro charts?
faq.answer: @delon/chart builds on @ant-design/charts (G2Plot) with Angular-specific wrappers for ng-alain projects.
